name: nudgly
description: Root scripts: run all tests and lint/format from repo root.

scripts.format: npm run format --prefix frontend && (cd backend && ruff format .)
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check --prefix frontend && (cd backend && ruff format --check .)
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && (cd backend && ruff check .)
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint --prefix frontend && (cd backend && ruff check --fix .)
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix frontend && (cd backend && ../.venv/bin/python manage.py test)
